title: Gonjiam: Haunted Asylum
tmdbOverview: The crew of a horror web series travels to an abandoned asylum for a live broadcast, but they encounter much more than expected as they move deeper inside the nightmarish old building.
synopsis: Released in 2018, Gonjiam: Haunted Asylum is a horror and mystery film from South Korea. It carries a 6.5 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a +13 certification (AR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
